title: Bug: op failed to verify that width of result type has to be smaller than or equal to the input type

features.name: packed struct with single bit field
features.description: Code should include a typedef struct packed containing a single logic bit field

features.name: 2D unpacked array of packed struct
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array of a packed struct type with parameter-controlled depth

features.name: always_latch procedural block
features.description: Code should include an always_latch block containing a conditional or loop construct
features.snippet:
always_latch begin
    for ( int array=0 ; array<2 ; array++ ) begin
        for ( int row=0 ; row<DEPTH ; row++ ) begin 
            Qall[array][row] = D_flopped;
        end
    end
end

features.name: nested for loops with variable indices
features.description: Code should include nested for loops with variable loop indices iterating over a 2D array
features.snippet:
for ( int array=0 ; array<2 ; array++ ) begin
    for ( int row=0 ; row<DEPTH ; row++ ) begin 
        Qall[array][row] = D_flopped;
    end
end

features.name: 2D array element assignment with variable indices
features.description: Code should include an assignment to a 2D array element using two variable indices in a procedural block
